limits: single PostgreSQL cluster; no cross-cluster orchestration
no native retry — must implement in job logic with execution IDs
5000 ms timeout when invoking Edge Functions via Supabase Cron UI (pg_net itself can go higher)

edge_functions.trigger: HTTP via pg_net from pg_cron, or webhook, or API call
edge_functions.limits: Wall time depends on plan; Free 25s, Pro 150s, Team/Enterprise 400s
patterns: self-healing cron with status table + retry logic

queue_optional.use_case: When >5s timeout needed; cron enqueues, worker drains async

cost_model.pg_cron: FREE (included in Supabase plan, even free tier)

operational_characteristics: Native Supabase observability (Logs, Insights, Cron job_run_details)
Code lives in SQL functions or Edge Functions (TS) — already in stack
Replay via SELECT * FROM cron.job_run_details + manual re-trigger
